title: thui0/dss_project: DSS RNA-Seq Analysis

description: This repository contains the code used for the RNA-seq analysis and figure generation for the manuscript: "Epithelial-specific loss of Smad4 in the Colon Enhances the Wound Healing Response and Alleviates the Fibrotic Response in an Acute DSS Mouse Model."
